title: State Pension underpayments: progress on cases reviewed to 31 March 2025
body: "In 2020, the Department for Work and Pensions became aware of a number of individuals who had not had their State Pension increased, in accordance with the law, automatically when this should have occurred. This prompted the department to take action to investigate the extent of the problem.  This publication includes information on the progress of the Legal Entitlements and Administrative Practice (LEAP) exercise to check and correct individual cases, and the amount of arrears repaid to date.  This publication updates the previous release State Pension underpayments: progress on cases reviewed to 30 September 2024 .  "
